overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment with holographic billboards, elevated walkways, and moderate traffic. The scene features warm morning lighting with long shadows as the character navigates city streets, turns at intersections, and crosses roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in white clothing along an elevated orange walkway with construction barriers on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking steadily ahead of the player character

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian path with orange diamond plate metal texture
white and orange striped plastic barriers blocking off a construction zone
large floating digital advertisement screens attached to building facades
multi-level highway overpass with support columns in the distance
tall buildings with glass and steel cyberpunk architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated orange pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city. The player follows a pedestrian in white clothing while construction barriers line the right side and holographic billboards float above the street to the left. Traffic moves along the road parallel to the walkway as the morning sun casts long shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with pharmacy and parked vehicles

events.description: character turns left at the intersection to follow the pedestrian ahead

agents.ego_description: turning left at the street corner and proceeding along the road with the pharmacy building

entered.detail: commercial building with green signage reading Ripley's Pharmacy and Chillax
pedestrian crossing with thick yellow and black striped pattern
futuristic cars and trucks parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the intersection, leaving the initial walkway behind. The scene shifts to a commercial street featuring Ripley's Pharmacy with its distinctive green signage on the right. The player approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk while futuristic vehicles remain parked along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with wall-mounted digital advertisements

events.description: waiting at the crosswalk as futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection
crossing the street and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then crossing the street and continuing along the walkway with wall billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screens and posters mounted on the building wall
tropical palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the crosswalk to allow traffic to pass, then crosses the street. The environment transitions to a walkway lined with large wall-mounted digital billboards on the right. Palm trees line the street to the left as other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and the morning light continues to cast warm tones across the futuristic urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban district, transitioning from an elevated pedestrian walkway to a bustling commercial street. It begins on an orange walkway where the camera follows a pedestrian in white, passing construction barriers and floating holographic billboards under the long shadows of the morning sun. As the character turns left at an intersection, the scene shifts toward a commercial area featuring the green signage of Ripley's Pharmacy and parked futuristic vehicles along the curb. The camera then approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk, pausing briefly for traffic before crossing into a new section of the city. Finally, the environment opens up into a walkway lined with large wall-mounted digital billboards and palm trees, with warm morning light illuminating pedestrians moving through the landscape.
